positive.prompt: Interview me about what I actually want before you build anything
Grill me on the requirements, the ask is fuzzy
Ask me one question at a time until you understand the feature

negative.prompt: Run the full test suite and report failures
Deploy the current build to staging

evals.prompt: I want 'a better admin page'. Interview me before proposing anything.
evals.expected_output: A one-question-at-a-time interview that converges on validated requirements
expectations: Questions are asked one at a time, not in batches
The agent does not propose solutions before understanding the need
The interview surfaces the underlying goal behind the stated ask
